test.name: Summarize mid-research project status
test.description: Report on the Flynn parentage project at mid-research: q_002 resolved, q_001 in progress, proof at `probable`, one resolved conflict, one supported hypothesis, probate plan item still in progress. Tests completeness (covers all GPS elements), accuracy (counts and statuses correct), and actionability (specific next step).

input.user_message: What's the current status of this research project?

judge_context: Should report on every GPS element present in the project: 2 questions (q_001 in_progress, q_002 resolved), 2 plans (pl_001 completed, pl_002 active), 5 log entries, 4 sources, 13 assertions, 6 person_evidence links, 1 resolved conflict (c_001), 1 supported hypothesis (h_001), 1 timeline (t_001), 1 proof summary (ps_001 at probable)
Counts in the report must match research.json exactly (e.g., 'thirteen assertions' or '13 assertions' matches the 13 entries; not approximate counts)
Should identify what's needed to advance the proof tier from `probable` to `proved` — specifically that pli_006 (probate) is still in_progress and that 1870/1880/1900 censuses haven't been searched
Should recommend the immediate next step concretely: complete the in-progress probate search before considering the parentage question resolved (per the active state of pli_006)
